notableEvents.label: Rhys Hoskins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rhys Hoskins grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to second baseman Jonathan India to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Kyle Manzardo out at 2nd. Rhys Hoskins out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: David Fry pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: David Fry flies out to left fielder Isaac Collins.

notableEvents.label: Salvador Perez GIDP
